text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the autumn Tenno Sho, and
it's been raining since morning.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Pray tell, rain! For whom do you send your
glittering droplets down? Ah, but of course, it is
for the sake of making me shine and sparkle!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I hope I don't slip and fall...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Falling is not an issue, so long as you get up again
each time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You will do that, yes? I trust you'll chase me down
with grace and beauty?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look at me, bothering my favs with my otaku nonsense... Bad Digitan! Upholding proper decorum's like the first rule of being a simp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well, um... Don't you worry, I'm a big simp for
you too, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't need people watchin' me on a whim. I'll make them look.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In that case... Apologies for being so forward, but
please allow me the honor of gazing upon your
visage from the front of the pack!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Already declarin' yourself the victor, are
you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Bold move, but it beats the fangirl worship
nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A showdown between the two of us should make
for an interesting rebuttal.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's see which one of us'll be the face of our
generation.
